page.title: GEO Score
page.description: Composite readiness score for your brand's AI visibility

cap.label: Core factors only
cap.tooltip: Accuracy is not yet measured. The composite is shown capped at 95 until the Accuracy factor is live.

citation_frequency.name: Citation Frequency
citation_frequency.description: How often the brand is cited across AI platforms

source_diversity.name: Source Diversity
source_diversity.description: Number of distinct domains citing the brand

position_stability.name: Position Stability
position_stability.description: First-mention rate and consistency over time

accuracy.name: Accuracy
accuracy.description: Rate of factually correct AI statements about the brand

coverage_breadth.name: Coverage Breadth
coverage_breadth.description: Presence across monitored platforms and locales

factor.notYetScoredHint: This factor will be scored when accuracy tracking ships
factor.insufficientDataHint: Collect more data over the selected period to score this factor

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.empty: No recommendations — your score is strong across every factor
recommendations.estDeltaTooltip: Estimated composite lift if this factor alone reaches 75, with all other factors held constant. Actual impact depends on how factors interact.

citation_frequency.title: Increase citation frequency
citation_frequency.description: Your share of AI citations is below the category benchmark. Focus on publishing authoritative content around priority prompts.

source_diversity.title: Broaden your citing sources
source_diversity.description: AI platforms cite you from only a few domains. Earn coverage across more publications, directories, and reference sites.

sentiment_balance.title: Improve sentiment balance
sentiment_balance.description: Net sentiment is negative or neutral. Address sources of negative mentions and surface positive case studies.

position_stability.title: Stabilize your position
position_stability.description: Your position swings widely between runs. Strengthen canonical references so AI models anchor on them.

coverage_breadth.title: Expand platform and locale coverage
coverage_breadth.description: Your brand appears in only some of the monitored platforms or locales. Extend visibility to the missing combinations.

empty.title: No GEO score yet
empty.description: Once prompt runs produce citations, sentiment, and position data we can compute your composite score.

errors.brandRequired: Select a brand to see its GEO score
errors.insufficientFactors: Not enough data yet to compute a composite score

alert.thresholdHint: Alert when composite score drops below this value
